problem_text_cn: 匀质细圆环（半径R、质量m、总电量Q），t=0时以水平向东的平动速度v₀在绝缘水平地面上运动（无滚动）。圆环与地面间摩擦系数为μ，空间存在水平向北的匀强地磁场B。1. 确定圆环始终不离开地面的v₀取值范围；2. 导出纯滚动前任意t时刻的圆环平动速度v(t)；3. 若v₀=mg/(2QB)，求圆环刚达到纯滚动状态的时刻T。
problem_text_en: A homogeneous thin ring (radius R, mass m, total charge Q) moves on an insulated horizontal ground with a horizontal eastward translational velocity v₀ at t=0 (no rolling). The friction coefficient between the ring and the ground is μ, and there is a uniform horizontal geomagnetic field B pointing north in space. 1. Determine the range of v₀ for the ring to never leave the ground；2. Derive the translational velocity v(t) of the ring at any time t before pure rolling；3. If v₀=mg/(2QB), find the time T when the ring just reaches the pure rolling state.
problem_solution_cn: （1）v₀的取值范围：- 圆环平动时，电荷受洛伦兹力F=QvB（竖直向上），地面支持力N=mg−QvB；- 圆环不离开地面需N≥0，即v≤mg/(QB)；- 初速度v₀为最大平动速度，故v₀≤mg/(QB)。（2）纯滚动前的平动速度v(t)：- 摩擦力f=μN=μ(mg−QvB)，平动加速度a=−f/m=−μ(g−QBv/m)；- 分离变量积分：∫(dv/(g−QBv/m))=−∫μdt（积分区间v₀到v，0到t）；- 解得v(t)=mg/(QB) + (v₀−mg/(QB))e^(−μQBt/m)。（3）纯滚动时刻T：- 摩擦力矩M=fR=μ(mg−QvB)R，转动惯量I=mR²，角加速度β=M/I=μ(mg−QvB)/(mR)；- 积分得角速度ω(t)=∫₀^t βdt=∫₀^t [μ(mg−QvB)/(mR)]dt；- 纯滚动条件ωR=v(T)，代入v₀=mg/(2QB)和v(T)表达式；- 化简解得T=(m/(μQB))ln[mg/(mg−QBv₀)]=(m/(μQB))ln2。
problem_solution_en: （1）Range of v₀：- When the ring translates, the charge is subjected to Lorentz force F=QvB（vertically upward）, and the ground support force N=mg−QvB；- For the ring not to leave the ground, N≥0 is required, i.e., v≤mg/(QB)；- The initial velocity v₀ is the maximum translational velocity, so v₀≤mg/(QB)。（2）Translational velocity v(t) before pure rolling：- Friction force f=μN=μ(mg−QvB), translational acceleration a=−f/m=−μ(g−QBv/m)；- Separate variables and integrate：∫(dv/(g−QBv/m))=−∫μdt（integration interval from v₀ to v, 0 to t）；- Solving gives v(t)=mg/(QB) + (v₀−mg/(QB))e^(−μQBt/m)。（3）Time T to reach pure rolling：- Friction torque M=fR=μ(mg−QvB)R, moment of inertia I=mR², angular acceleration β=M/I=μ(mg−QvB)/(mR)；- Integrate to get angular velocity ω(t)=∫₀^t βdt=∫₀^t [μ(mg−QvB)/(mR)]dt；- Pure rolling condition ωR=v(T), substitute v₀=mg/(2QB) and v(T) expression；- Simplify and solve for T=(m/(μQB))ln[mg/(mg−QBv₀)]=(m/(μQB))ln2。
problem_answer: ight) e^{- rac{\mu Q B t}{m}{}}$；3. 纯滚动时刻$T= rac{m}{\mu Q B}{\}ln2$
